fields.name: Contract Category
fields.businessRule: Disable this field with All Contracts as Option. User will not be selecting this fields.

fields.name: CDA/NDA Available?
fields.businessRule: Dependent Upon #7, Open this field if Selection 'New Contract, Renewal, Addendum, Termination'. Field Inputs Types: CDA, NDA, Not Applicable

fields.name: 9-Point Declaration
fields.businessRule: 9-Point Declaration shall be in PDF or Image Document duly signed

fields.name: PO No.
fields.businessRule: Dependent Upon #8, Open this field if Selection = PO Number

fields.name: Capex No.
fields.businessRule: Dependent Upon #8, Open this field if Selection = Capex No.

fields.name: Court of Jurisdiction
fields.businessRule: Fix New Delhi as text in this, if user has to write something else, they will write this field by removing New Delhi.

fields.name: Contract Term
fields.businessRule: Refer the table - Colum H and Column I

fields.name: Initial Renewal Date
fields.businessRule: This field will be shown and will be mandatory when Contract Term is selected as Fixed Term With Auto - Renewal

fields.name: Date of Main Agreement
fields.businessRule: To be opened up when Contract Document Type is selected as = Addendum/Termination/Renewal/Amendment

fields.name: Scope of Work/ Deliverables
fields.businessRule: Don't show this field on Request Form, This field to come up as Mandatory on Publish Form For Legal.

fields.name: Registered Office Address
fields.businessRule: if Registered office option is selected in above field

fields.name: Corporate Office Address
fields.businessRule: if Corporate office option is selected in above field

fields.name: Head Office Address
fields.businessRule: if Head office option is selected in above field

fields.businessRule: if Branch office option is selected in above field

fields.businessRule: if Principal office option is selected in above field

fields.name: Counterparty PAN No.
fields.businessRule: This field to come up as Mandatory if Counterparty Type is selected as 'New'

fields.name: Counterparty MSME No. Applicable?
fields.businessRule: This field to come up as Mandatory if Counterparty Type is selected as 'New'

fields.name: Provide MSME No.
fields.businessRule: This field to come up as Mandatory if above field is selected as YES

fields.name: Counterparty CIN No. Applicable?
fields.businessRule: This field to come up as Mandatory if Counterparty Type is selected as 'New'

fields.name: Provide CIN No.
fields.businessRule: This field to come up as Mandatory if above field is selected as YES

fields.name: PO
fields.businessRule: Mandatory when PO No. is selected in field ="PO No./ Capex No. "

fields.name: Capex
fields.businessRule: Mandatory when Capex is selected in field ="PO No./ Capex No."

fields.name: CDA
fields.businessRule: Mandatory when CDA is selected in field ="CDA/NDA"

fields.name: NDA
fields.businessRule: Mandatory when NDA is selected in field ="CDA/NDA"

fields.name: PAN No.
fields.businessRule: Mandatory when 'New' is selected in field ="Counterparty Type"

fields.name: MSME No.
fields.businessRule: Mandatory to upload when response to field "Counterparty MSME No. Applicable?" is YES

fields.name: CIN No.
fields.businessRule: Mandatory to upload when response to field "Counterparty CIN No. Applicable?" is YES
